stats_definitions.cohen_d: signed (error - correct) / pooled_sd; >0 means error higher
stats_definitions.auroc_cross_problem_signed: P(error > correct); >0.5 means error higher; treats each chain as one obs
stats_definitions.auroc_within_problem_paired_signed: P over same-problem (err, cor) pairs; difficulty controlled
stats_definitions.wilcoxon_within_problem_paired: per-problem delta = mean(err) - mean(cor), Wilcoxon signed-rank on those
stats_definitions.direction_verdict: error_higher / correct_higher / n.s. (sig if either MW-p OR Wilcoxon-p < 0.05)
